title: rubus caflischii subsp. denticulatus
intro: Rubus caflischii subsp. denticulatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus caflischii subsp. denticulatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus caflischii subsp. denticulatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
